# Bash Gotchas

> Known bash shell patterns that cause silent failures or unexpected output. Load HIGH entries before writing any bash scripts.

## Entries

- [jq outputs pretty-printed JSON by default -- use -c for JSONL](jq-compact.md): jq -c produces single-line output. Without -c, grep and wc -l fail on multi-line JSON. HIGH.
- [Git Bash on Windows: PATH and tool availability](git-bash-windows.md): /usr/bin not always on PATH. Use explicit PATH setup or full paths for utilities in scripts and hooks. MEDIUM.
